markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content services to the Boulevard team.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**End-to-End Partnership:** GrowthX offers a complete content solution (strategy, creation, execution) to replace Boulevard's current fragmented agency model.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**AI-Powered, Human-Refined:** Content is AI-generated but heavily refined by human experts using a proprietary platform that ingests deep client context (personas, brand voice) to ensure quality and relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [**Phased Engagement:** The partnership begins with an 8-week, opt-out strategy sprint (includes \~10 articles) to de-risk the commitment, followed by a 12-month execution phase.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [**Focus on Owned Channels:** GrowthX's core service is SEO/AEO content for owned channels. They do not manage social media, PR, or customer interviews.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)

## Topics

### Boulevard's Objectives & Concerns

  - [**Primary Goal:** Lift organic traffic and generate leads, not just traffic, with a scalable, data-driven strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** A clear approach for managing 700+ existing articles, including refreshing and potentially removing underperforming content.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [**Technical SEO:** Clarification on GrowthX's role in implementing technical optimizations vs. providing recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
  - [**AI Search Traffic:** A key concern is how to capture traffic and leads from AI overviews, given data suggesting low click-through rates to source websites.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2561.0)

### GrowthX's Solution & Approach

  - [**Core Service:** An end-to-end partner for SEO and AEO (AI Engine Optimization), creating a content engine to become the "best answer" across search platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Methodology:** Combines traditional keyword research with an audience-first AEO approach to build a large, high-quality content surface area.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [**Proprietary Platform:** An internal tool orchestrates AI workflows (using models from OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) for deep research, outlining, and drafting.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [**Human Oversight:** A dedicated team (Managing Director, Managing Editor, Content Manager) refines all AI output, ensuring brand voice, accuracy, and strategic alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### Engagement Model & Logistics

  - [**Phase 1: Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, opt-out)**](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [**Goal:** De-risk the partnership and demonstrate quality.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** Technical audit, content audit, \~10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Growth Execution (12 months)**](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Daily publishing (5+ articles/week), a mix of net-new and refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Workstreams:**](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
          - [**Editorial:** Standard long-form content.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
          - [**Programmatic:** Swappable alternative for data-driven page generation (e.g., location-based content).](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
      - [**Pricing:** Starts at $15k/month for one workstream; custom workstreams (e.g., tools) are additional ($9k–$15k).](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)

### Scope & Boundaries

  - [**Technical SEO:** GrowthX provides recommendations; implementation is TBD.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
  - [**Off-Page SEO:** Not a standard offering. Backlinking may be explored after 3–6 months but is not committed upfront.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [**Content Repurposing:** GrowthX's content is available for Boulevard's team to repurpose; they do not manage social media or PR execution.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)
  - [**Customer Interviews:** Not included; Boulevard's team must provide transcripts for case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2512.0)
  - [**Image Workflow:** GrowthX generates AI-based cover images. Integration with Boulevard's DAM is not standard but can be explored.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2041.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
      - [Confirm if GrowthX implements technical SEO optimizations or only provides recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
      - [Clarify the scope of off-page SEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
      - [Confirm if GrowthX recommends removing underperforming content.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [Offer to schedule a follow-up with CEO Marcel for deeper technical questions.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2835.0)
  - [**Boulevard Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2801.0)
      - [Regroup internally to discuss the proposal after next week's board meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/sxGrygG5Fs1v9f2e8uQdGiFT7314D1iU?tab=summary&timestamp=2801.0)
